blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 9 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of an audit trail that includes IP address and timestamp, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of such an audit trail. Therefore, the step is inconclusive as the necessary evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive outcome.
